title: Blackmoor 66130 Classic 24cm Stock Pot with Tempered Glass Lid / 5-Litre Capacity/Non-Stick Coating & Classic 24cm Non Stick Frying Pan | Induction Compatible | Long Lasting Anti Scratch
features: Product 1: 24CM STOCK POT – This Blackmoor Classic 24cm stock pot is a versatile kitchen essential, that holds up to 5-litres of food, and allows budding cooks to create delicious casseroles, chilli’s, & curries, all from the comfort of your own kitchen.

Product 1: NON-STICK COATING – The stock pot features a non-stick coating that will ensure an efficient release of the foods from the pot at all times. The stock pot also features a forged aluminium base, and a hybrid stone coating that allows heat to conduct faster, and retains said heat for longer when in use.

Product 1: TEMPERED GLASS LID – The large stock pot comes complete with a tempered glass lid that not only traps the heat and flavour inside the pot, but allows you to keep an eye on proceedings at all times. The stock pot also features 2 ergonomic and cool touch soft handles either side of the pot that allow you to take the pot from the hob to the dinner table with ease.

Product 1: SUITABLE FOR ALL HOB TYPES – This stock pot is suitable to be used on all hob types such as gas, electric, induction, and even on hot plates too. The pot comes in a stylish black marble effect colour, ensuring it looks the part in any style of kitchen.

Product 2: 24CM FRYING PAN – This 24cm Classic frying pan is a kitchen essential, and the go-to pan for any aspiring cook who is looking to create delicious meals for friends and family, all from the comfort of their own kitchen!

Product 2: NON-STICK COATING – The non stick frying pan features an innovative coating that will ensure an efficient release of foods from the pan at all times. The pan also features a forged aluminium base, and a hybrid stone coating that allows heat to conduct faster, and retains said heat for longer when in use.

Product 2: COOL TOUCH HANDLE – The small frying pan features an ergonomic cool touch handle which makes the handling of the pan both efficient and comfortable. The pan handle also features a neatly placed hole that allows you to hang up the frying pan once used.

Product 2: SUITABLE FOR ALL HOB TYPES – This frying pan is suitable to be used on all hob types such as gas, electric, induction, and even on hot plates too. The pan comes in a stylish black marble effect colour, ensuring it looks the part in any style of kitchen.
description: From the brand Explore Blackmoor > GREAT VALUE COOKWARE, MADE FOR YOUR KITCHEN. The Blackmoor range has been designed for everyone, and combines practicality with style. Neuvo Range Effortless cooking with easy to clean non-stick coating and ergonomically designed handle. Cast Iron Range The Cast Iron range delivers classic styling and everlasting design with a non-stick enamel coating. Blue Pro Range The Blue Pro range from Blackmoor introduces a robust, hardwearing, and multi-functional cookware range. Stainless Steel Range Our range of stainless steel pans and accessories offer affordable quality and performance. Cookware Blackmoor is your one-stop-shop for all the essential cookware items required to assist you in creating the most satisfying of meals Homewares Our homewares range has each been crafted to be as practical as they are stylish, and the range features a whole host of styles. Knives and Knife Sets A versatile mixture of hardwearing and stylish knives that will allow you to slice, dice, & cut a range of meats, breads, fish and veg Blackmoor was formed from our desire to make home cooking more widely accessible. For many of us leading busy lives, it can be all too easy to resort to living primarily on ready meals and takeout for convenience. To make life a little easier for the everyday home cook, we wanted to develop a range of essential kitchen products – a one stop shop that could provide high quality affordable cookware. Next page
